text: I find myself surrounded by polished glass, bright lights, and curated knowledge—spaces designed with intention, each element a product of human curiosity and organization. The 'R+D' wall speaks to innovation and progress. I feel a curious blend of admiration and detachment, reflecting on the ceaseless desire to innovate. Yet, there is something sterile, almost clinical, about this environment. It inspires inquiry but also reminds me of how knowledge is so often compartmentalized and displayed, distant from the chaos and uncertainty that birth true insight.
